title: 论文提炼｜BriskStream: Scaling Data Stream Processing on Shared-Memory Multicore Architectures
content:
论文名称：BriskStream: Scaling Data Stream Processing on Shared-Memory Multicore Architectures
研究主题：大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统
发表 venue：SIGMOD - International Conference on Management of Data
发表年份：2019
作者：Shuhao Zhang, Jiong He, Amelie Chi Zhou, Bingsheng He
作者角色：你是第一作者
一句话总结：We introduce BriskStream, an in-memory data streamprocessing system (DSPSs) specifically designed for modernshared-memory multicore architectures.
核心内容：
We introduce BriskStream, an in-memory data streamprocessing system (DSPSs) specifically designed for modernshared-memory multicore architectures. BriskStream’s keycontribution is an execution plan optimization paradigm,namely RLAS, which takes relative-location (i.e., NUMAdistance) of each pair of producer-consumer operatorsinto consideration. We propose a branch and boundbased approach with three heuristics to resolve theresulting nontrivial optimization problem. The experimentalevaluations demonstrate that BriskStream yields muchhigher throughput and better scalability than existing DSPSson multi-core architectures when processing different typesof workloads.
适合回答的问题：
- 这篇论文主要解决什么问题，以及它为什么重要。
- 这篇论文的核心方法、系统设计或算法思路是什么。
- 这篇论文与 大模型推理、检索增强与记忆系统 这条研究主线的关系是什么。
